page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.large is an entry-level virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.s2 family, built on the KVM hypervisor and utilizing the x86_64 CPU architecture. This server features 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores, resulting in 1.0 thread per core. It is configured with 4.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance does not include any local storage or bundled GPUs, and it offers zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a hardware capability perspective, the CPU lacks support for advanced instruction sets, including Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX, AVX512), Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), and cryptographic acceleration flags such as AES or SHA_NI. Additionally, hardware-level virtualization extensions (VMX/SVM) and hyperthreading are not enabled. This streamlined instruction profile restricts the server's suitability for complex vector mathematics, deep learning inference, or hardware-assisted cryptography.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.s2.large offers a predictable but modest compute profile. It is qualitatively positioned as a budget-friendly option for lightweight workloads that require dedicated CPU resources without the overhead of shared-core burstable models. Appropriate workloads include basic web serving, lightweight application hosting, small-scale development environments, and simple utility services that do not require high memory capacity, local storage, or advanced CPU instruction sets.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.large is an entry-level x86_64 virtual server featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs across 2 physical cores and 4.0 GB of system memory. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a dedicated CPU allocation with 1.0 thread per core and 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, bundled GPUs, or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The processor lacks advanced instruction sets such as AVX, AVX512, AMX, and hardware-accelerated cryptography (AES/SHA). This streamlined hardware profile makes the ecs.s2.large a cost-efficient option for lightweight, predictable workloads. It is best suited for basic web serving, development environments, and simple utility tasks that do not require high memory density or advanced vector processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.large is a KVM-based x86_64 virtual server featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs, 4.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, optimized for lightweight utility workloads and basic web serving.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core x86_64 virtual server with a 1:2 compute-to-memory ratio for predictable, lightweight utility workloads.

4.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core
KVM hypervisor architecture on the x86_64 platform
No local storage or bundled GPU resources included
